summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BoltDashPi5 Raspberry Pi Dashboard. Backend APIs mostly functional with 84.6% success rate. Frontend UI working well with successful login, navigation, and core functionality.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error - missing alert_thresholds table in database schema
Returns 500 error - Docker not installed in environment

ui_bugs.issue: Demo mode doesn't display expected 'Demo User' text after login

passed_tests: Auth/me endpoint - 200 OK with user data
Current metrics endpoint - 200 OK with proper structure
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Add missing alert_thresholds table to database schema for metrics history. 2. Handle Docker not being available gracefully (return empty containers or mock data). 3. Fix demo mode user display text.
success_percentage: Backend: 84.6% (11/13 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed)
